title: bidens balsana
intro: Bidens balsana, also known as Balsam Bidens, is a flowering plant species in the aster family, native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens balsana include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as wounds, burns, and eczema, as well as its use in treating fever and respiratory issues. Bidens balsana is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
